Peer-reviewed journal articles

  1. An Anisotropic Inf-Convolution BV Type Model for Dynamic Reconstruction Bergounioux, M., and Papoutsellis, E. SIAM Journal on Imaging Sciences 2018 [hal] [link]
  2. Infimal Convolution Regularisation Functionals of BV and L^p Spaces. Part I: The finite p case Burger, Martin, Papafitsoros, Konstantinos, Papoutsellis, E, and Schönlieb, Carola-Bibiane Journal of Mathematical Imaging and Vision 2016 [arXiv] [link]
  3. Total variation regularization in measurement and image space for PET reconstruction Burger, M., Müller, J., Papoutsellis, E., and Schönlieb, C. B. Inverse Problems 2014 [arXiv] [link]

Preprint

  1. Infimal convolution spatiotemporal PET reconstruction using total variation based priors Bergounioux, Maïtine, Papoutsellis, E, Stute, Simon, and Tauber, Clovis 2018 [hal]

Conferences

  1. Infimal Convolution Regularisation Functionals of BV and L^p Spaces. The Case p=∞ Burger, Martin, Papafitsoros, Konstantinos, Papoutsellis, E, and Schönlieb, Carola-Bibiane In System Modeling and Optimization 2016 [arXiv] [link]

Thesis

  1. Papoutsellis, E. (2016). First-order gradient regularisation methods for image restoration: reconstruction of tomographic images with thin structures and denoising piecewise affine images (PhD thesis). University of Cambridge. [link]

Miscellaneous

  • Oscillating patterns in images, Master of Advanced Study, Part III of Mathematical Tripos, University of Cambridge, 2011, Supervisor: Prof. Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb.
  • Boundary Value Problems and the Mountain Pass Theorem, Diploma in School of Applied Mathematics and Physical Sciences, National Technical University of Athens, 2010, Supervisor: Prof. Nikos Yannakakis.
